data.title: Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF (TSX: MUSA) announces Q3 2025 distributions for unitholders.
data.description: In Toronto on July 24, 2025, the Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF (TSX: MUSA) disclosed that distributions for Q3 2025 will be disbursed to unitholders. The Fund will be paying dividends to eligible holders of Middlefield U.S. Equity Dividend ETF for the quarter.

data.title: ORCA Marine introduces Finsulate® and Hy.G Motors to U.S market, revolutionizing eco-friendly boating; set for launch in July 24, 2025.
data.description: YARMOUTH, Maine - On July 24, 2025, ORCA Marine USA revealed a groundbreaking development in the boating industry with the introduction of Finsulate® and Hy.G Motors in the United States and Canada. Finsulate®, renowned as a revolutionary product, is set to transform the eco-friendly boating experience. This launch marks a significant turning point in the industry, showcasing two pioneering products that are poised to reshape boating practices. The introduction of these innovative solutions demonstrates a commitment to sustainability and efficiency in boating. The initiative is expected to have a profound impact on the boating sector in the U.S. and Canada, with stakeholders eagerly anticipating the widespread adoption of Finsulate® and Hy.G Motors. Stay tuned for the buzz surrounding these game-changing products as they redefine the future of boating in the region.

data.title: Greenlight Guru acquires Enzyme, second acquisition in recent weeks, boosting innovation for medtech, life sciences.
data.description: In a recent development, Greenlight Guru, a prominent provider of advanced software solutions for the complete medical device lifecycle, revealed their acquisition. This marks as their second acquisition in a short span of time, reflecting their commitment towards advancing innovation for medtech and life sciences companies. The acquisition comes on July 24, 2025, in Indianapolis. This move showcases the company's strategic approach in driving growth and enhancing services.

data.title: Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) to pay distributions to unitholders for Q3 2025.
data.description: The Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) based in Toronto has declared distributions for the third quarter of 2025 for its unitholders. The payments will be made as per the Fund's distribution announcement. This initiative aims to benefit the unit holders of Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF during the specified period.

data.title: 33% of US internet households subscribe to a direct-to-consumer sports-specific streaming service, per Parks Associates report.
data.description: A fresh white paper, produced in collaboration with InterDigital, delves into the status of live sports streaming. Parks Associates unveiled their latest study titled "Streaming Live Sports: Where Opportunity Meets Complexity" on July 24, 2025, in Dallas. This research report analyzes the current landscape of live sports streaming, highlighting the opportunities and challenges in the industry. The study provides valuable insights for companies and investors looking to understand this market better.

data.title: DDC Enterprise partners with QCP Group to advance Bitcoin treasury strategy. Aim is to enhance yield on DDC's Bitcoin holdings.
data.description: In New York, DDC Enterprise Limited (NYSE: DDC) disclosed a significant development in its Bitcoin treasury strategy by partnering with QCP Group, a renowned digital asset solutions provider. This collaboration is aimed at creating and executing advanced institutional-grade strategies to optimize DDC's Bitcoin holdings. QCP will design and implement tailored, risk-controlled strategies to enhance DDC's treasury performance. This strategic collaboration marks a crucial step for DDC in maximizing its Bitcoin assets.

data.title: Gain Therapeutics to present at BTIG Annual Virtual Biotechnology Conference on July 29th-30th. Company's management to participate.
data.description: Gain Therapeutics, Inc., a biotechnology company traded on Nasdaq under the symbol GANX, based in Bethesda, Maryland, revealed plans to take part in a fireside chat and individual meetings at BTIG’s Annual Virtual Biotechnology Conference slated for July 29th and 30th. The conference will feature the Company’s management team discussing the latest advancements in allosteric small molecule therapies.

data.title: Bitcoin upgrade includes ZK-proofs for more decentralization, aiming for higher ranking on L2Beat and enabling DeFi on Bitcoin.
data.description: Upgrades to the Build on Bitcoin project include implementing Zero-Knowledge fraud proofs, with the goal of improving decentralization rankings on L2Beat. The initiative aims to enable Bitcoin to achieve DeFi capabilities comparable to Ethereum.

data.title: Actelis Networks secures order for GigaLine backhaul technology from European group member, enabling gigabit connectivity for mobile base stations over existing infrastructure, saving on fiber costs.
data.description: Innovative GigaLine technology is revolutionizing mobile connectivity by providing gigabit speeds to mobile base stations using current infrastructure. This advancement eliminates the need for expensive fiber deployments. With Gigaline, mobile base stations can achieve lightning-fast gigabit connectivity without the added cost and hassle of laying new fiber optics. This breakthrough technology is set to significantly improve mobile network capabilities, with data speeds reaching up to 1 gigabit per second. Say goodbye to costly infrastructure upgrades - GigaLine is paving the way for faster, more efficient mobile communication.
